_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: Y102 resulted in an increase in 8-OHG compared to DMSO, suggesting an increase in oxidative stress and subsequent damage following Y102 treatment
details: Y102 resulted in increased 8-hydroxyguanosine (8-OHG) expression compared to DMSO, indicating increased oxidative stress and DNA damage
